component.name: genv
component.summary: Track, sync, and reproduce your software environment

description.p: genv is a command-line tool that lets you declare your software environment — packages, environment variables, shell aliases, and services — in a single genv.json file and apply it consistently across Linux, macOS, and WSL2.

ul.li: Declarative package management across apt, dnf, pacman, flatpak, snap, and more
Environment variable management with drift detection
Shell alias and rc snippet management
Service lifecycle management with systemd and launchd integration
Dry-run planning and machine-readable JSON output for CI
